## Filter interface

A basic filter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface Filter extends NamedModel<FilterModelName>, Identifiable 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [NamedModel](./x-types.namedmodel.md)<!-- -->&lt;[FilterModelName](./x-types.filtermodelname.md)<!-- -->&gt;, [Identifiable](./x-types.identifiable.md)

## Remarks

It is like an "abstract" interface because it is not going to be implemented but it is extended by other interfaces. There will never be an object with this type.

|  Property | Type | Description |

|  [selected](./x-types.filter.selected.md) | boolean | Flag if the filter is selected or not. |
